title: Additional Glowing
description: Adds more glowing features with glow berries, spectral arrows and more!
body:
Additional Glowing

Adds additional gameplay features to utilise the glowing effect and glowing items

Features

  • Spectral Arrows will glow yellow when fired
  • Piglins with Crossbows will always fire Spectral Arrows
  • Climbing cave vines with berries growing will cause you to glow
  • Consuming Glow berries will cause you to glow
  • Coming in close contact with a glow squid will make the squid glow
  • Compatible with Minecraft 1.18 and up, last tested on Minecraft 1.19
